overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character hiking up a dry hillside trail overlooking Los Santos. The character walks steadily along the dirt path before veering off to admire the panoramic city and ocean views from the cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: dry hillside trail with scattered oak trees

events.description: distant city skyline becomes visible through the trees on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily uphill on the dirt trail

entered.detail: winding dirt path ascending the hillside with tire tracks
green leafy oak trees lining the left side of the trail
dry rocky slope with sparse brown vegetation
tall skyscrapers of Los Santos visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a dry, rocky hillside trail surrounded by scrub vegetation and oak trees. Around the 10-second mark, the Los Santos city skyline emerges into view on the left horizon as the camera continues uphill.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated hillside trail with expanding city views

agents.ego_description: character continues walking up the trail with the city skyline visible to the left

segments.scene_description: The character maintains a steady pace up the winding trail, with the city skyline becoming more prominent on the left. The terrain remains dry with scattered trees and rocky outcrops lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside overlook with panoramic city and ocean views

events.description: character turns left and leaves the main trail to walk along the hillside edge
character stops briefly to look at the city view before continuing

agents.ego_description: character veers off the trail to explore the cliff edge, stops to admire the panoramic view, then continues along the ridge

entered.detail: clusters of vibrant purple flowers growing on the hillside
curved asphalt road visible winding through the valley below
blue ocean visible beyond the city skyline

segments.scene_description: Leaving the main trail, the character explores the hillside edge where purple wildflowers grow. The camera reveals a winding road below and a panoramic view of the city and ocean. The character pauses briefly to take in the vista before continuing along the ridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement ascending a rugged hillside that gradually opens into a panoramic vista of a sprawling city and ocean. It begins with a steady climb up a dry, rocky trail flanked by scrub vegetation and oak trees, as the Los Santos skyline slowly emerges on the left horizon. As the character maintains this uphill pace, the city becomes increasingly prominent against the arid terrain and scattered rocky outcrops. The scene then shifts as the character veers off the main path toward the hillside edge, passing through patches of purple wildflowers. Finally, the camera expands to reveal a winding road below and a wide panoramic view of the urban landscape and distant sea before continuing along the ridge.
